metadata.description: AI Supply Chain Intelligence - Seed Data with Full Historical Time Series
data_sources: SK Hynix IR / Samsung IR / Micron IR

_notes.2024_2026_type: 2024 = audited actual; 2025 = full year actual/guidance; 2026 = guidance as stated in Q4 2025 earnings
_notes.source: Company 10-K and earnings calls; Microsoft FY2025 guidance $80B; Amazon guidance $105B 2025
_notes.unit: USD billion (annual CapEx, includes real estate, network, data centers, GPU purchases)

hyperscaler_capex_quarterly_usd_bn._source: Company quarterly earnings releases; values in USD billion

_notes.source: NVIDIA quarterly earnings (10-Q, 8-K). FY2024=calendar year for consistency.
_notes.2023Q2_inflection: ChatGPT demand surge fully materializes in orders; H100 allocation sold out

gpu_shipments._notes: GPU units; rack = NVL72 72-GPU rack system. Source: analyst estimates (JPMorgan, Bernstein, IDC)

hbm_market._source: Omdia HBM Market Report 2024; TechInsights; company IR data

cowos_capacity._notes: CoWoS = Chip on Wafer on Substrate; TSMC monopoly for AI GPU packaging. Source: TSMC IR, DigiTimes

datacenter_power._notes: IEA Electricity 2024; Goldman Sachs AI power demand analysis. US grid interconnection queue 2600GW as of 2024

nand_price_index._source: TrendForce NAND Flash Price; StorageReview enterprise SSD pricing

gpu_shipments._notes: Unit counts. Source: JPMorgan, Bernstein, IDC analyst estimates. B200 ramp H2 2025

hbm_capacity_utilization_quarterly._notes: Estimated from SK Hynix, Samsung production commentary and demand/supply analysis

token_demand_estimates._notes: Estimates based on public user counts × avg session tokens. ChatGPT: 200M DAU × 100K tokens/day estimate

token_demand_annual_estimates._source: Sequoia Capital AI Infrastructure 2024; analyst estimates; company API usage disclosures

ai_model_milestones.significance: Attention is All You Need — foundation of modern LLMs
175B params; few-shot learning emergence; drove A100 demand
Consumer AI breakthrough; 1M users in 5 days, 100M in 2 months
MoE architecture est; multimodal; drove H100 allocation surge
Open-source 70B; democratized local AI; drove NAND SSD demand
Claude-3 Opus SOTA; H100 cluster scaling
Chain-of-thought at inference time; 10x compute vs GPT-4 per query
Open-source, 671B MoE; matched o1 at fraction of cost; disrupted GPU spend thesis
Extended thinking; agentic workflows dominant use case
Next-gen reasoning model; drives B200/GB200 demand
Multi-modal; TPU v6 trained; GB200 inference cluster

capacity_utilization_2025._note: 2025 annual average estimate (used for seed/legacy compatibility)

capacity_utilization_time_series._notes: Quarterly estimates based on company commentary, analyst reports, supply/demand model

key_events_timeline.event: GPT-3 released — 175B parameter language model
key_events_timeline.impact: First proof of scale; drove A100 GPU orders from OpenAI/Microsoft

key_events_timeline.event: NVIDIA H100 announced at GTC 2022
key_events_timeline.impact: 4x performance over A100; PCIe and SXM5 variants; HBM3 requirement

key_events_timeline.event: ChatGPT launch — 1M users in 5 days
key_events_timeline.impact: Consumer AI breakthrough; triggered AI infrastructure spending race

key_events_timeline.event: Microsoft $10B investment in OpenAI; Azure OpenAI GA
key_events_timeline.impact: Committed $10B+ to AI; Azure integration of GPT-4

key_events_timeline.event: ChatGPT reaches 100M users (2 months)
key_events_timeline.impact: Triggers GPU demand surge; H100 waitlist 12+ months

key_events_timeline.event: NVIDIA Q1 FY2024 earnings — $7B Data Center revenue (+409% YoY)
key_events_timeline.impact: Confirmed hyperscaler GPU orders; H100 dominant; data center supercycle begins

key_events_timeline.event: NVIDIA Data Center revenue surpasses $10B in single quarter
key_events_timeline.impact: H100 allocation sold out 12-18 months; AMD MI300 demand pull-in

key_events_timeline.event: NVIDIA H100 allocation waitlist 12+ months
key_events_timeline.impact: GPU supply constraint established; $30K+ spot market

key_events_timeline.event: SK Hynix HBM3e wins majority NVIDIA H200 supply
key_events_timeline.impact: HBM market share solidified; SK Hynix utilization >94%

key_events_timeline.event: Microsoft announces $80B AI CapEx for FY2025
key_events_timeline.impact: Largest single CapEx announcement in tech history at that point

key_events_timeline.event: TSMC CoWoS capacity becomes critical bottleneck
key_events_timeline.impact: Limits GPU shipment velocity; TSMC raises CoWoS pricing 20%+

key_events_timeline.event: NVIDIA Blackwell (B200/GB200) NVL72 ramp begins
key_events_timeline.impact: H200 transition bridge period; GB200 NVL72 requires 6x HBM per rack vs H100

key_events_timeline.event: UAE announces $100B AI investment partnership with US
key_events_timeline.impact: Sovereign AI demand wave; G42/MGX partnership; 50,000+ GPU orders

key_events_timeline.event: DeepSeek R1 open-source release — matched o1 at low cost
key_events_timeline.impact: Short-term GPU demand concern; long-term 'Jevons paradox' drives more demand

key_events_timeline.event: Vertiv and Eaton power infrastructure capacity sold out through 2026
key_events_timeline.impact: Power/cooling bottleneck emerges as next major constraint after HBM

key_events_timeline.event: Amazon Q1 2025: $24B CapEx in single quarter
key_events_timeline.impact: Largest quarterly CapEx ever; AWS AI infrastructure acceleration confirmed

key_events_timeline.event: GB200 NVL72 rack shipments ramping at hyperscalers
key_events_timeline.impact: Next-gen AI cluster deployment begins; HBM4 demand pull

key_events_timeline.event: US CHIPS Act Samsung Texas 4nm fab begins production
key_events_timeline.impact: US domestic advanced foundry; 2nm timeline risk

key_events_timeline.event: SK Hynix begins HBM4 mass production
key_events_timeline.impact: Next-gen HBM with 2TB/s bandwidth; Blackwell Ultra target

key_events_timeline.event: Total AI CapEx projected $500B+ for 2026
key_events_timeline.impact: AI infrastructure spend becomes largest capex category globally

key_events_timeline.event: US-China export controls expand — H20 restrictions confirmed
key_events_timeline.impact: China forced to domestic Huawei Ascend 910B/C; NVIDIA loses $10B+ China revenue

investment_signals_seed.thesis: HBM3e dominant supplier (52% share), 92% utilization, 2.5x demand growth, GB200/Blackwell Ultra key beneficiary, HBM4 production ramp 2025-2026
investment_signals_seed.catalyst: GB200 NVL72 rack ramp 2025-2026; HBM4 premium pricing
investment_signals_seed.risk: Samsung HBM3e certification/qualification, HBM4 execution risk, Korea geopolitics
investment_signals_seed.price_target_rationale: ASP premium 20-30% on HBM4 vs HBM3e; volume +40% YoY

investment_signals_seed.thesis: HBM3e market share gain from 10% toward 20%+; US CHIPS Act beneficiary; geopolitical hedge
investment_signals_seed.catalyst: NVIDIA HBM supply diversification; Idaho HBM fab expansion
investment_signals_seed.risk: Execution risk vs SK Hynix competitive moat; yield ramp

investment_signals_seed.thesis: CoWoS monopoly for AI packaging 88% utilization → 120K wpm 2026; foundry pricing power at 3nm/2nm; N2 ramp 2025
investment_signals_seed.catalyst: CoWoS expansion 85K→120K wpm; N2 volume production; advanced packaging ASP increase
investment_signals_seed.risk: Geopolitical Taiwan risk; Intel Foundry 18A competition; customer concentration

investment_signals_seed.thesis: Data center power infrastructure 85% utilization; sold out through 2026-2027; order book $8B+; DC power demand doubles to 100GW by 2026
investment_signals_seed.catalyst: Hyperscaler DC buildout acceleration; liquid cooling upgrade cycle for GB200
investment_signals_seed.risk: Execution risk at scale; copper supply chain; new entrants (Schneider)

investment_signals_seed.thesis: InfiniBand + Ethernet for AI clusters; ASIC custom chip revenue $10B+ by 2027 (Google TPU, Meta MTIA, Apple); networking 78% utilization
investment_signals_seed.catalyst: 400G/800G upgrade cycle; Google/Meta ASIC design wins confirmed
investment_signals_seed.risk: NVIDIA NVLink competition; hyperscaler insourcing full stack

investment_signals_seed.thesis: Dominant but Phase 1 largely priced in; B200/GB200 ramp key; CUDA software moat deepens; Data Center $49B/quarter run rate
investment_signals_seed.catalyst: Blackwell Ultra (B300/GB300) 2026; sovereign AI GPU orders
investment_signals_seed.risk: Valuation ($3T+); custom ASIC displacement; DeepSeek efficiency compression; export controls

investment_signals_seed.thesis: Gas turbine and grid equipment for AI DC power; order book record; $50B→$100B DC power demand 2024-2026
investment_signals_seed.catalyst: AI DC power demand growth; nuclear/gas baseload for hyperscalers
investment_signals_seed.risk: Regulatory permitting delays 3-5yr; grid interconnection queue

investment_signals_seed.thesis: Custom ASIC and networking silicon for hyperscalers; Amazon Trainium3 design win; cloud-optimized silicon revenue $3B+ by 2027
investment_signals_seed.catalyst: Amazon Trainium3 volume ramp; Google TPU interconnect wins
investment_signals_seed.risk: Broadcom competition in ASIC; hyperscaler insourcing

investment_signals_seed.thesis: HBM3e NVIDIA certification key catalyst; if passes, 35%+ HBM share reclaim; cheapest way to play AI memory
investment_signals_seed.catalyst: HBM3e NVIDIA qual in 2025; HBM4 architecture advantage
investment_signals_seed.risk: Continued HBM yield issues; SK Hynix design advantage; foundry losses

tsmc_revenue_by_node_pct._source: TSMC Annual Report 2024; Morgan Stanley estimates 2025

ai_inference_vs_training_split._notes: Inference growing as AI services scale; drives different GPU/memory requirements
ai_inference_vs_training_split._source: Goldman Sachs AI Infrastructure 2024; NVIDIA management commentary
